added: Color-coded tag management system for UI performance reports
Tags API endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) for tag CRUD operations
UIResultTagsModal component with color picker and multi-select input
Tags display on report detail pages with edit functionality
Tags column in reports table with colored badges
Service tag protection (baseline) and duplicate prevention
Multi-tenant schema isolation for all tag operations
changed: UIReport model: tags field changed from ARRAY(String) to JSON format
Tags now support custom colors with hex values
